team.name: Jack Carlsen
team.desc: Jack is fishing in the pond as you read this, catching another story to tell. He loves directing for the screen with actors, and is the brains behind many of the projects you see here. A graduate of Loyola Marymount University's film production program, he knows how to work hands on with visual effects, sound design, and more to tell out of this world stories.

team.name: Karina Salerno
team.desc: Karina's the one who makes sure our productions go swimmingly, and that all our ducks are in a row. She's organizing people, locations, equipment, and so much more. If you can't find her she's probably nesting among a boatload of spreadsheets, stretching the last of our budget to the limits.
